calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Miles Lendway, CSR#13684.
John Mario Ferrera, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Sharon Salvador Dizon; mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.
Based on declaration filed on September 3, 2014 the court waves the requirement of Notice to to other parent or consent to other parent.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Alexandria Shariz Dizon Hinojales to Alexandria Danielle Dizon.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
